items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a persona books an appointment while driving. However, the evidence does not provide any details on how the mobile app supports voice commands or the specific functionality for booking appointments in such a context. Without this critical information, it is impossible to determine if the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report can be achieved.
